violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Sides of the fryer and stove need to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood system needs to be cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The board above the kitchen area is bare wood.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor in the back and side rooms needs to be cleaned. Floors in the kitchen area need to be cleaned. Walls in the kitchen area need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. There is plastic on the ceilings in the side store room and back room for leaks in the ceiling. The ceiling above the kitchen area has exposed paper. Missing sheetrock by the door to the front store room.

General premises. — --Items unnecessary for the operation and maintenance of the food establishment were being stored on the premises. Establishment has magazines and other items stored in the establishment.--Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. Holes in the ceiling are allowing leaking in the side store room and back room
